result.documentation:
First, check if the a caching backend is available
If no caching mechanism available, will download the file every time
result.name: <anonymous>
remoteURL

result.documentation:
Choose cache key for filesystem cache
When using the main revision (default), we use the request URL as the cache key.
If a specific revision is requested, we account for this in the cache key.
result.name: fsCacheKey
result.signature: let fsCacheKey = revision === 'main' ? requestURL : pathJoin(path_or_repo_id, revision, filename);

result.documentation: @type {string}
result.name: <anonymous>
proposedCacheKey
result.signature: let proposedCacheKey = cache instanceof FileCache ? fsCacheKey : remoteURL;
